title: GTCX meta-workspace members
description: Member repos for the GTCX meta-workspace (local cross-repo co-development). The root pnpm-workspace.yaml is GENERATED at the ecosystem parent by platform/scripts/meta-workspace/setup.mjs — never hand-edited. Only 'verified' members are included by default; 'candidate' members are added with --include-candidates once they install cleanly on their own.

members.note: Globs reconciled to real tree; protocols subtree builds + tests green (vaultmark 470/470).
Installs clean on its own (own workspace, 0 dead globs). Resolves gtcx-os platforms' cross-repo @gtcx/ui dep by membership.
AI-OS engine (7-layer pipeline, router, vault). Consumed cross-repo by intelligence/sdk + bridge-os. Verify own install before promoting to 'verified'.
AI command surface (gtcx-baseline MCP + agents) -> depends on baseline-os. Verify own install before promoting.

notes.nestedWorkspaces: Each member keeps its own pnpm-workspace.yaml for STANDALONE use. Run pnpm from a repo for standalone mode; run from the ecosystem parent for META mode. The generated root spans members for cross-repo dev/CI.
notes.publish: For CI/release, shared packages (@gtcx/ui, baselineos, @gtcx/protocols-crypto) are published (see ecosystem-os publish registry); the meta-workspace is for local co-development, not release pipelines.
notes.rollout: Add a repo as 'candidate', verify `pnpm install` succeeds in it standalone (like gtcx-os + ledger-ui were), then promote to 'verified' so the generator includes it.
